title: carduus scolymus
intro: Carduus scolymus, also known as the Scolymus thistle or artichoke thistle, is a type of thistle plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating a range of health conditions. The health benefits of Carduus scolymus include reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as supporting liver and kidney function. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as extracts and infusions, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
